content:
# Al Jawf Area

**Summary**: A region in northern Saudi Arabia characterized by significant agricultural activity.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2022-karami|Karami, 2022]] focused the study on the Al-Jawf area to assess local aquifer impact.

## Geological and Structural Setting

- [[2022-karami|Karami, 2022]] Arid basin with sedimentary aquifers

## Formations Present

- [[2022-karami|Karami, 2022]] saq-formation, tawil-formation

## Key Findings From This Location

- The study area represents the Saq Aquifer subsurface extent and the overlying Tawil-Quarternary Aquifer System. ([[2022-karami|Karami, 2022, p. 20]])
